title: External file reference
description: Single external file entry referenced by index.

index.description: 0-based index used by payload to reference this external file.

uri.description: URI or path to the external file (e.g., file:///path/to/data.csv, https://example.com/data.csv).

encoding.description: Character encoding of the external file.

fileFormat.title: File format
fileFormat.description: Allowed formats for external data files.

fieldSelector.title: Field selector
fieldSelector.description: Common way to reference and extract a field from an external file regardless of format.

externalFileIndex.description: Index of the external file (as declared in metadata.externalDataSources.files) to extract this field from.

fieldName.description: The required field name in the standard.

columnName.description: Column header name (if hasHeader is true).

path.description: JSON Pointer path (RFC 6901) or dot-notation path to the field (e.g., 'data.signature' or '/data/signature').
YAML path using JSON Pointer (RFC 6901) or dot-notation to the field (e.g., 'data.signature' or '/data/signature').

hashValue.title: Hash value
hashValue.description: Cryptographic hash of the external file for integrity verification.
